movie.synopsis: Aa Okati Adaku (2024) Aa Okkati Adakku (2024) Aa Okkati Adakku – Shubh Mangalam (2024) Gana, ironically a registrar who marries young couples regularly, faces enormous peer pressure to get married especially after being rejected by some 50-odd women. He gives a matrimonial platform called Happy Matrimony a shot, where Platinum members get to meet 10 women. He meets Siddhi through the matrimony service and pursues her. However siddhi has other plans ..
